properties.name: molandev.autoconfig.json.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用JSON自动配置，用于自定义时间格式转换规则

properties.name: molandev.autoconfig.task.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用任务调度自动配置，用于定时任务处理

properties.name: molandev.autoconfig.xss.uri
properties.description: XSS过滤器拦截的路由路径

properties.name: molandev.autoconfig.xss.path-patterns
properties.description: XSS过滤器拦截的路由路径列表

properties.name: molandev.autoconfig.xss.path-exclude-patterns
properties.description: XSS过滤器排除的路由路径列表

properties.name: molandev.autoconfig.xss.order
properties.description: XSS过滤器执行顺序，值越小优先级越高
